# CarryPass

CarryPass is an open-source, client-side password manager and team credential-sharing tool.

It is designed for privacy-first credential sharing without accounts, without a central identity provider, and without server-side access to plaintext secrets.

## Key concepts

- Client-side password generation
- Team credential sharing
- Encrypted admin, member, and team vaults
- Offline-first Progressive Web App
- Deterministic password generation
- AES-GCM encrypted vaults
- Argon2id, PBKDF2, and AES-CTR based password derivation
- Zero-knowledge philosophy
- Self-hostable static deployment

## Main pages

- Homepage: https://carrypass.net/
- User manual: https://carrypass.net/carrypass-user-manual.html
- Privacy policy: https://carrypass.net/carrypass-privacy-policy.html
- Disclaimer: https://carrypass.net/carrypass-disclaimer.html
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/racz-zoltan/racz-zoltan.github.io

## Short description

CarryPass helps individuals and small teams generate, store, and share credentials locally in the browser using cryptographic access control instead of server-side accounts or a central password database.
